description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
Super Productivity is an advanced todo list app with integrated Timeboxing and time tracking capabilities. It also comes with integrations for Jira, GitLab, GitHub and Open Project.
:mag: Quick file search & app launcher for Windows with community-made plugins
A fully open source & end-to-end encrypted note taking alternative to Evernote.
Your platform team, as a service
Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.
🎨 Powerful, minimalistic, cross-platform, opensource note-taking app

NEO Emacs (WIP): GPU powered Emacs written in Rust with a modern display engine.  Aiming for modern design/multi-threaded Elisp, 10x performance and 100% Emacs compatibility. 🚀  Inline 4K images/4K videos/WPEWebKit using GPU acceleration, DMA-BUF, ZERO-COPY. Rich animation effects support.
An Obsidian plugin that displays open tabs vertically, allowing users to group and organize tabs for a better navigation experience.

Your local AI session library. Browse, pin, and ⌘K-search every Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & OpenCode session — and let the built-in scanner catch leaked secrets. Local-first, nothing leaves your machine.

Cut your Claude / OpenAI / Gemini bill 70–95% on AI coding. Local proxy that compresses context, keeps provider caches hot, and verifies LLM output ($0 hallucination guard). Drop-in for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Aider + 34 more and custom providers — 30s, no code changes
Bookmarks & Notes Manager for Developers — with Markdown and Code Snippets support

Termul is Terminal Ultimate Manager a cross-platform desktop terminal manager built with Tauri and React. Organize terminals by workspace with persistent sessions, multiple shell, split panes, embedded browser tabs, and a built-in code & markdown editor.
Turn your architecture into a living, queryable knowledge graph - and render it as beautiful auto-laid-out Excalidraw diagrams. An MCP server for Cursor, Claude Code & Windsurf. Offline, no API keys.
